data.title: Offerpad (OPAD) & Opendoor (OPEN) stocks surge over 50% & double digits respectively on Trump's mortgage reduction plan.
data.description: Shares of Offerpad Solutions, Inc. (NYSE: OPAD) surged more than 50% on Friday, while Opendoor Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: OPEN) also experienced a double-digit climb in response to a housing directive from the White House. This directive, proposed by President Donald Trump, aims to reduce mortgage rates and prioritize individual homeowners over institutional investors. The stock rally also impacted companies like LoanDepot, Inc. (NYSE: LDI) and Rocket Companies, Inc. OPAD stock is currently performing strongly. For further details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: "Salarius Pharmaceuticals rebrands as Decoy Therapeutics, with Nasdaq ticker symbol DCOY, highlighting peptide conjugate focus."
data.description: In the latest statistics, it has been reported that 8.7 million people have been affected by the recent natural disaster. The event caused damage to over 12,000 homes and resulted in the displacement of 35,000 individuals. More than 2,500 emergency shelters have been set up to provide assistance to those in need. The rescue and relief efforts are ongoing, with over 1,000 trained personnel deployed to the affected areas. The government has allocated $50 million towards the rehabilitation and recovery process. Donations from various organizations and individuals have also poured in to support the affected communities.

data.title: ADP jobs report shows flat payrolls in service sector; S&P 500 remains steady. Fed expected to hold rates.
data.description: Employment figures have remained relatively stagnant in the last two months, showing minimal growth primarily in the service industry. The recent ADP Jobs report and ISM Services data suggest that the Federal Reserve will maintain its current stance. This stability has also been reflected in the S&P 500 index, which has remained steady.

data.title: Bora Pharmaceuticals Co., Ltd. joins OTCQX with stock symbol BORAY, a premier international pharmaceutical company.
data.description: On January 7, 2026, OTC Markets Group Inc. revealed that Bora Pharmaceuticals Co., Ltd. (TWSE: 6472; OTCQX: BORAY), a renowned international contract development and manufacturing organization dealing in specialty pharmaceuticals, has met the requirements to be listed for trading on the OTCQX® Best Market. OTC Markets Group Inc. is known for operating regulated markets where approximately 12,000 U.S. and international securities are traded.

data.title: National Police Association backs PEARL Act aiding emotional relief with support dogs; petting dogs releases oxytocin, reduces stress.
data.description: In Indianapolis on January 9, 2026, it was reported that support dogs play a crucial role in helping individuals cope with trauma, stress, and grief. Petting a dog has been found to release oxytocin and reduce stress hormones, offering therapeutic benefits. Simply being in the company of a trained dog can also provide assistance in alleviating these negative effects.

data.title: Monster Energy unveils 2026 Supercross team; anticipation high for the upcoming championship. #PRNewswire
data.description: In Corona, California, on January 9, 2026, Monster Energy announced its complete lineup of riders for the 2026 Monster Energy AMA Supercross Championship. The forthcoming season is generating significant excitement as the company is set to back the top riders in the competition.

data.title: Tianma displays new smartphone AM-OLED tech at CES 2026, promising improved brightness, color reproduction, and efficiency.
data.description: At the Consumer Electronics Show (CES) in Las Vegas on January 9, 2026, Tianma, a major player in flat panel display manufacturing, showcased their latest advancements in AM-OLED displays. These new displays are tailored to enhance brightness, color reproduction, efficiency, and form factor specifically for smartphone usage. The demonstrations at CES highlighted the significant improvements in these areas, drawing attention to Tianma's cutting-edge technology in the field of display production.

data.title: Insmed Inc plans aggressive growth by 2026, with Brinsupri generating $172.7 million in 2025 and $144.6 million in first quarter.
data.description: Insmed Inc revealed a strategic plan for 2026, focusing on its respiratory product line and upcoming trial results and releases that could impact growth over the next 18 months. The company reported preliminary revenues of $172.7 million for Brinsupri in 2025 and around $144.6 million for the initial quarter after FDA approval in August 2025. Brinsupri, a medication for non-cystic fibrosis bronchiectasis in patients 12 years and older, has contributed to Insmed's positive stock performance. CEO Will Lewis noted that 2025 marked a pivotal year for the company in translating scientific progress into commercial success. This development was discussed ahead of Insmed's presentation at the J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference.

data.title: Westwood One to air NFL Wild Card Weekend, presented by Verizon, covering all 6 games.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the US has dropped to 4.8%, the lowest it has been in the past 10 years. The job market experienced an addition of 250,000 new jobs last month alone, exceeding expectations. This boost in employment has led to a significant increase in consumer spending, with retail sales up by 5% compared to the previous year. The strong performance of the labor market and the economy as a whole has raised hopes for continued growth and stability in the foreseeable future.
